subcodes.first_line: By God, the True One! None of thy words concerning thy recognition of the Self of God and thy steadfastness in His Cause have been presented before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله الحق ما حضر بین یدی العرش من کلماتک فی عرفانک نفس الله و اثباتک علی امره
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
